a:r.a:t: VP Sales / Marketing | External Compensation Plan Assessment
Market VP plans are more strongly tied to enterprise-level performance
, with compensation driven by regional revenue and profitability metrics (EBITDA / NOI), reinforcing alignment with long-term value creation.
HGV VP resemble Director-level (focusing on volume metrics) rather than shifting fully to profit-based incentives.
Total Compensation Range (i.e., Leverage / Actual potential earnings)
Total NSV (30%) | New Owner NSV (20%) | Regional NSV (10%) | DC Contribution (40%)
Total NSV (40%) | New Owner NSV (20%) | DC Contribution (40%)
Monthly / Quarterly / Annual achievement tiers, often tied to overall site or regional performance (specific levels of acceleration were not shared)
Quarterly / Annual true-ups or bonuses tied to overall results
VP’s and above are ineligible for incentives referenced under the “Short-Term Incentive, Contest, and Prize Drawing Policy”, unless approved in writing
N/A – SPIFFs more commonly used for lower levels
*Represents actual earnings data from 1/1/2025 through 12/31/2025, however does not represent mid-year job changes, and therefore might not be accurate for every employee
Where HGV Varies from the Market
